CustomField.description: fields missing at the current stage
CustomField.formula: IF(TEXT(Solution_Area_of_Interest__c)="",'•Solution Area of Interest;',"") & IF(TEXT(Application_Segment__c)="",'•Application Segment;',"") & IF(TEXT(Application_Market__c)="",'•Application Market;',"") & IF(TEXT(Application__c)="",'•Application;',"") & IF(TEXT(Application_Segment__c)="Life Science", IF(TEXT(Disease_Condition__c)="",'•Disease Condition;',"") ,"") & IF(IsConvertedfromLead__c=True, IF(TEXT(Type)="",'•Type;',""),"") & IF(fxRecordTypeName__c = "PKI SPI Sales Process For Dealers", IF(EndUserCountry__r.Name="",'•EndUserCountry;',"") & IF( AND( CONTAINS($Profile.Name,'Dealer') ,ISBLANK(TEXT(Special_Price_Question__c)) ),'•Special Price Question;',""),"") & IF( Quick_Close__c =True ,IF(TEXT( Funding__c )="",'•Funding;',"") & IF(OR(TEXT(Owner.Owned_by_Company__c) = 'AES' , TEXT(Owned_by_Company__c) = 'AES') ,IF(Territory2Id ="" ,"•Territory;" ,"") ,"") , "")
CustomField.inlineHelpText: fields missing at the current stage
CustomField.label: fxMissingFields_stage1
